titleStmt.title: SII 17.751: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 751. (A.R. No. 694 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Kharapurīśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Śaka 1364, Durmati, Kumbha śu. 11 Wednesday, Pūśam regularly correspond to 1442 A.D., February 21, Wednesday, ·20; ·79. The Śaka year 1364 was current.

This inscription records the remission of the taxes śūlavari and jōḍi in favour of the temples of Tirukkarapuram-uḍaiya nāyaṉār, Tiruvālīśvaram-uḍaiya nāyaṉār, Tirukkuṟuṅguḍi Appaṉ, and Perumāḷ Paḷḷikoṇḍaperumāḷ at Tiruppāṟkaḍal by Sāḷuva Tippayadēvamahārāja, for worship and offerings on all occasions to be conducted regularly by Mahattumallayasvāmigaḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmakāmaṇṭaliśvaran hariḷarāya vipāṭan pā[ ṣaik*] kut tappuvarāyara kaṇṭan muvarāyakaṇṭan Intuirāya
curattāṇan kaṇṭanāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātān pūrva dakṣiṇa paścim Uttara samudrātipati gajaveṭṭai
kaṇṭaruḷiya tevarāya mahārāyar pṛtivi Irājyam(m) paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa sakāptam 1000 3 100 6 10 4n mel cellāniṉṟa
durmmati saṅvatsarattu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaciyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa ma
ṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattu vaṭakarai nāṭṭut taniūr tiruppāṟkaṭalil Uṭaiyār tirukkara puram Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkum Uṭaiyār tiruvāliśvaram Uṭaiya
nāyiṉāṟkum perumāḷ tirukkuṟuṅkuṭi Appanukkum perumāḷ paḷḷikoṇṭa perumāṉukkum pūcai puṉaṟkāram tiṅkaḷ tivasam tirunāḷ tiruppaṇi naṭakkum paṭi
śrīmanmahāmaṇṭaleśvaran metinimiśuvarakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri sāḷuvairāya pituviirāya sāḷuva tippayateva mahāirājā nirnnayam paṇṇinapaṭi mahattu mallaya
cuvāmikaḷ Intak koyilkaḷukku [ carvatā] vāka naṭattumpaṭi pūcai puṉaṟkāram tiṅkaḷ tivacaṅkaḷum tirunāḷum Aṅkaraṅka vaipokaṅkaḷukku
Immahattu mallacuvāmikaḷe naṭattumpaṭikku coṭi cūlavariyum kaḻittu tārā pūrvamākak kuṭuttom tippayadevamahāirājā kāri
yattukku kaṭava Irukaṇa nāyakkaṟkku samuka Appaṇaiyum paṇṇi tanmacātaṉamuṅ kuṭuttu Aruḷinapaṭi Ikkoyilkaḷukku coṭi cūlavariyuṅ kaḻittu
tiṅkaḷ tivacam tirunāḷkaḷum pūcai puṉaṟkāram Aṅkaraṅka vaypokaṅkaḷum naṭakkumpaṭikku (paṭi)kkalluveṭṭik kuṭuttom Inta tanmam cantiirātittavaraiyum
naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Iṉta tanmattukku Ahitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kapilaip pacuvaikkoṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum tānamā
ḷum pūrvamaṟṟa mariyāti naṭattakkaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikku tanma cātanam paṇṇikkuṭuttom � svadattāt tvikuṇam puṇyam paradattarṉu pālanam [ paradattāpa]
hāreṇa svadattam niṣphalam bhavet .
Digital edition of SII 17.751 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
